sprints.name: opencode-implementation
sprints.stopWhen: The bounded implementation is committed, targeted validation passes, no unrelated files changed, and the branch contains at least one useful commit.

sprints.name: goose-validation
sprints.stopWhen: The validation artifact is committed, every claim names its evidence, and no product implementation files were changed.

sprints.name: agy-architecture
sprints.stopWhen: The architecture documentation and Mermaid diagram are committed, renderable, evidence-based, and contain no unsupported runtime claims.

sprints.name: copilot-tests
sprints.stopWhen: The bounded tests or validator are committed and pass, with no application behavior changes.
